message:
feat(tui): register ATC screen in TUI screen registry

Add the Air Traffic Controller (ATC) screen to the TUI system:
- New pub mod atc declaration
- Atc variant added to MailScreenId enum
- Atc added to ALL_SCREEN_IDS ordered list
- MailScreenMeta entry in MAIL_SCREEN_REGISTRY: title "ATC",
  category System, description "Air Traffic Controller decision
  engine with agent liveness, conflict, and evidence ledger"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
